sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, txt VARCHAR(255), lines_per_section INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, txt, lines_per_section) VALUES (1, 'Sample Text', 5);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, txt, lines_per_section) VALUES (2, 'Another Example That Is Unexpectedly Long To Examine Edge Cases', 10);
SELECT uuencode(txt, 5, lines_per_section) - 'Some Random String' AS encoded_text FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT uuencode(txt, 5, lines_per_section) AS encoded_text FROM test_table WHERE lines_per_section > 5;
SELECT uuencode((SELECT txt FROM test_table WHERE id = 2), 5, lines_per_section) - (SELECT txt FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS encoded_difference;
SELECT id, (lines_per_section - 10) AS adjusted_lines, uuencode(txt, 5, lines_per_section) FROM test_table HAVING adjusted_lines < 0;
SELECT id, uuencode(txt, 10, lines_per_section) AS full_encoded FROM (SELECT txt, lines_per_section FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) subquery;
SELECT uuencode(CONCAT(txt, '-') AS encoded_combined FROM test_table GROUP BY lines_per_section HAVING AVG(lines_per_section) BETWEEN 1 AND 10;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT uuencode(txt, lines_per_section, 5) AS temp_encoded FROM test_table WHERE txt IS NOT NULL;
